prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock **D13A 1.3L DDiS diesel (Fiat-sourced Multijet, 89 HP)** with a **Garrett GT1749V turbocharger** (OEM upgrade for Fiat 1.3 Multijet engines) paired with a **Bosch CP3 high-pressure fuel pump** (from Fiat 1.6 Multijet) to support 220 HP at 4,000 RPM with 380 Nm torque at 2,000 RPM. Requires **Siemens VDO 7-hole injectors (0445120143)** and a **custom ECU remap via Alientech KESSv2 (protocol 585)** for rail pressure adjustments.

Drivetrain: Install a **QuattroGti 6-speed short-throw shifter (QG-STS-001)** with **Pedders heavy-duty clutch kit (PED-4457)** and **OS Giken Super Lock LSD (OS-G154H)** for the front-wheel-drive layout. Replace the stock 4.56 final drive with a **4.10 ratio from the Maruti Ertiga (5MT) for better top-end acceleration**.

Suspension: Fit **Bilstein B14 PSS coilovers (B14-2310)** with **Eibach Pro-Kit springs (E20-23-050-02-22)** and **Whiteline adjustable sway bars (BMR79X for front, BMR80X for rear)**. Reinforce the subframe with **Hardrace front strut bar (HR-SUB-001)** and **Cusco rear lower arm braces (666 540 A)** to reduce flex under hard cornering.
estetica: Aero: Install a **Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (LW-VITARA-BREZZA)** with **custom carbon fiber front splitter (Seibon CF-VB-001)** and **Rocket Bunny rear diffuser (RB-VB-002)**. Replace the stock mirrors with **Volk Racing TE37SL 18x9.5 +35 wheels (Hyper Silver)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 (225/40R18)** for aggressive stance.

Exterior: Full **3M Matte Military Green (S8305) wrap** with **Vinyl Lab carbon fiber hood (VL-CF-VB-001)** and **custom LED taillights (Luxx Customs LC-VB-001)**. Remove the roof rails and replace with **Seibon carbon fiber roof (CF-VB-002)** to reduce weight by 8 kg.

Interior: Replace the stock seats with **Recaro SRD-E (R-2094) bucket seats** in **Alcantara (Black/Green stitching)**. Install a **Sparco Pro 2000 steering wheel (015271B3S)** with **NRG quick-release hub (NRG-101)**. Add a **Defi BF Advance gauge cluster (DF11201)** with **oil temp, boost, and wideband AFR sensors** mounted in a **custom A-pillar pod (Autometer 2600)**.
